ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR STATUS. STATUS REPORT TO BE FILED AND SERVED BY 06/08/04, CALENDAR OF JUN-15-2004 AGREEMENT REACHED ON MEETING WITH MR. HUGHES AND DISTRIBUTION OF THE JEWELRY AND SILVER. MR. OKEEFFE WILL HOLD THE TRUST INSTRUMENT AND HE WILL FILE THE WILL IN SACRAMENTO COUNTY. COURT IS ORDERING EACH PARTY TO PAY HER OWN ATTORNEYS FEES. NO SANCTION FOR THE MOVE. ALL REMAINING ISSUES ARE RESERVED AND MR. OKEEFFE WILL TRY TO MEDIATE THE ISSUES. THE COURT WILL NOT ENTERTAIN ANY DISPUTES PRIOR TO 2003. EACH PARTY MUST FILE THEIR PLEADING NO LATER THAN 8/13, REPONSE BY 8/27 AND REPLY BY 9/3. COURT IS SETTING THE HEARING ON THE PLEADINGS ON 9/13 AT 11AM.
ORDER AFTER HEARING FILED BY PETITIONER COLEMAN, LORRAINE MARIE
